prompt:
Goal: Create a two-panel vertical comparison image showing the same futuristic skyscraper concept rendered by two different image models at night.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 aspect ratio, 768×1024 feel, split horizontally into exactly 2 equal stacked panels with no visible border line. Both panels show a dark blue nighttime cityscape with a starry sky and glowing urban lights.

Panel 1: Top half labeled Banana pro in large white blocky stencil/gothic display lettering at the upper left. Show a futuristic illuminated skyscraper centered in a dense city district, surrounded by mid-rise apartment towers, roads, trees, and a plaza. The tower has a tall twin-volume form with vertical ribbed glass, bright white outline lighting, warm lit windows, angular cutouts, and a glowing geometric base/plaza. Camera angle is elevated aerial view, looking slightly downward, crisp cinematic night lighting.

Panel 2: Bottom half labeled GPT image 2 in the same large white blocky display lettering at the upper left. Show a similar but more refined futuristic skyscraper centered in a nighttime urban landscape, taller and sleeker, with stacked faceted glass sections, luminous vertical lines, bright white edge lighting, warm interior floors, and a glowing multi-level podium. Surround it with high-rise residential towers, tree-lined roads, intersections, and distant city lights. Camera angle is elevated aerial view, cinematic and realistic.

Visual style: Photorealistic architectural visualization, dramatic blue-black night palette, crisp high contrast, cool white neon accents, realistic city depth, subtle stars, polished glass reflections, high detail, no people visible.

Text content: Use exactly 2 visible text labels: Banana pro and GPT image 2. Keep the typography large, white, angular, and slightly retro-futuristic.

Constraints: Include exactly 2 comparison panels, exactly 2 central skyscraper subjects, and exactly 2 large labels. Do not add logos, watermarks, captions, UI elements, arrows, or extra explanatory text.
